title: Revamped Cats
description: This mod revamps cat and ocelots in Minecraft
body:
Revamped Cats is a mod that improves the looks of cats and ocelots.

 

Currently, it improves thier hunting skills to hunt down parrots (As well as cats hunting chickens and ocelots hunting rabbits).

 

Planned Features:

???

 

NOTICE: Backports not included and I always will not do it
